description: Residential solar PV monitoring - 5.24 kWp system with 2 micro inverters and 8 panels

panels.description: Total cumulative energy produced since system installation

targets.rawSql: SELECT (COALESCE(MAX(total_production_1_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(total_production_2_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(total_production_3_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(total_production_4_sensor), 0)) AS lifetime_kwh_east FROM "East Microinverter"

SELECT (COALESCE(MAX(total_production_1_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(total_production_2_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(total_production_3_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(total_production_4_sensor), 0)) AS lifetime_kwh_west FROM "West Microinverter"

panels.title: Lifetime Free Energy

panels.description: Total energy produced today from both inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT (COALESCE(MAX(today_production_1_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(today_production_2_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(today_production_3_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(today_production_4_sensor), 0)) AS today_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'

SELECT (COALESCE(MAX(today_production_1_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(today_production_2_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(today_production_3_sensor), 0) + COALESCE(MAX(today_production_4_sensor), 0)) AS today_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'

panels.title: Today's Free Energy

panels.description: Maximum solar power achieved today

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(MAX(power_sensor), 0) AS peak_kw FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(power_sensor), 0) AS peak_kw FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'

panels.title: Peak Today

panels.description: Current total solar production from both inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS solar_kw FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS solar_kw FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Solar Power

panels.description: Current power drawn from the grid via smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(power) AS grid_kw FROM "grid" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Grid Import

panels.description: Current household power consumption (CT direct measurement: Floor 1 + Floor 2 + 236 Floor 1)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor1_w FROM "235_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor2_w FROM "235_floor_2" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor3_w FROM "236_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: House Load

panels.description: Percentage of house load covered by solar production

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS east_w FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS west_w FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS grid_w FROM "grid" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Self-Consumption

panels.description: Current operating state of each microinverter

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(selector_last(device_state_sensor, time)['value'], 'Offline') AS "East Inverter" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 minute'
SELECT COALESCE(selector_last(device_state_sensor, time)['value'], 'Offline') AS "West Inverter" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '1 minute'

panels.title: System Status

panels.description: Solar power flowing into the house

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS solar_kw FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS solar_kw FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: ☀️ Solar → House

panels.description: Total household power consumption (CT direct measurement: Floor 1 + Floor 2 + 236 Floor 1)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor1_w FROM "235_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor2_w FROM "235_floor_2" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor3_w FROM "236_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: 🏠 House Load

panels.description: Power drawn from the electrical grid

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(power) AS grid_kw FROM "grid" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: House ← Grid ⚡

panels.description: Floor 1 consumer unit power (CT direct measurement)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS "Floor 1 Power" FROM "235_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: 🏠 Floor 1 Power

panels.description: Floor 2 consumer unit power (CT direct measurement)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS "Floor 2 Power" FROM "235_floor_2" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: 🏠 Floor 2 Power

panels.description: 236 Floor 1 consumer unit power (CT direct measurement)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS "236 Floor 1 Power" FROM "236_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: 🏠 236 Floor 1 Power

panels.description: Total house load — CT direct measurement (Floor 1 + Floor 2 + 236 Floor 1)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor1_w FROM "235_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor2_w FROM "235_floor_2" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS floor3_w FROM "236_floor_1" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: ⚡ CT Load

panels.description: Total house load — derived calculation (Solar East + Solar West + Grid)

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS east_w FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS west_w FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power), 0) AS grid_w FROM "grid" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: 🔢 Calculated Load

panels.description: Real-time power distribution — solar production vs grid import vs house load over the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, SUM(pw) AS "Production" FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS pw FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS pw FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power) AS "Grid" FROM "grid" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT time, SUM(pw) AS "Load" FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS pw FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS pw FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 UNION ALL SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, GREATEST(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS pw FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power) AS "235 Floor 1" FROM "235_floor_1" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power) AS "235 Floor 2" FROM "235_floor_2" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power) AS "236 Floor 1" FROM "236_floor_1" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Power Profile

panels.description: Power output over time — East (orange) vs West (blue) inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_sensor) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Solar Production

panels.description: Current power output per inverter

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(power_sensor), 0) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Inverter Power

panels.description: Today's energy production split between East and West inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'

SELECT MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'

panels.title: East / West Split

panels.description: Daily energy production — East (orange) vs West (blue)

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('day', time) AS time, MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "East" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT date_trunc('day', time) AS time, MAX(today_production_1_sensor) + MAX(today_production_2_sensor) + MAX(today_production_3_sensor) + MAX(today_production_4_sensor) AS "West" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Energy

panels.description: Hourly production intensity over time. Color shows total system power (kW). Select Last 90 days for best view.

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) AS "East W" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS time, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) AS "West W" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Daily Production Heatmap

panels.description: Current grid voltage from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(voltage) AS voltage FROM "grid" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Grid Voltage

panels.description: Current grid frequency from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(frequency_sensor) AS frequency FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Grid Frequency

panels.description: Current power factor from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(power_factor_sensor) AS pf FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Power Factor

panels.description: Current grid current from smart meter

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(current) AS current FROM "grid" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Grid Current

panels.description: Grid voltage and frequency trends over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(voltage) AS "Voltage" FROM "grid" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(frequency_sensor) AS "Frequency" FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Voltage & Frequency

panels.description: Grid power factor and current trends over time

targets.rawSql: SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(power_factor_sensor) AS "Power Factor" FROM "Smart Meter" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '5 minutes', time) AS time, AVG(current) AS "Current" FROM "grid" WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Power Factor & Current

panels.description: Current power output per solar panel — 8 panels across 2 inverters

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv1_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV1" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv2_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV2" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv3_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV3" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv4_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV4" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv1_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV1" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv2_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV2" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv3_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV3" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv4_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV4" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: Panel Power

panels.description: Per-panel metrics — power, voltage, current, today's and total energy production

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  'East PV1' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv1_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv1_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv1_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_1_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_1_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'East PV2' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv2_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv2_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv2_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_2_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_2_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'East PV3' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv3_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv3_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv3_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_3_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_3_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'East PV4' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv4_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv4_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv4_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_4_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_4_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "East Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'West PV1' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv1_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv1_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv1_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_1_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_1_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'West PV2' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv2_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv2_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv2_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_2_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_2_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'West PV3' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv3_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv3_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv3_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_3_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_3_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

SELECT
  'West PV4' AS "Panel",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv4_power_sensor), 0) AS "Power (W)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv4_voltage_sensor), 0) AS "Voltage (V)",
  COALESCE(AVG(pv4_current_sensor), 0) AS "Current (A)",
  COALESCE(MAX(today_production_4_sensor), 0) AS "Today (kWh)",
  COALESCE(MAX(total_production_4_sensor), 0) AS "Total (kWh)"
FROM "West Microinverter"
WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.description: Physical panel positions on roof with color-coded production heatmap. West slope on top, East slope on bottom.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv1_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV1" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv2_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV2" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv3_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV3" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv4_power_sensor), 0) AS "East PV4" FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv1_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV1" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv2_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV2" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv3_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV3" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(pv4_power_sensor), 0) AS "West PV4" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(temperature_sensor), 0) AS "Temperature" FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(selector_last(device_state_sensor, time)['value'], 'Offline') AS state FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(selector_last(device_state_sensor, time)['value'], 'Offline') AS state FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: West State

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(selector_last(device_alarm_sensor, time)['value'], 0) AS alarm FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: West Alarm

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(selector_last(device_fault_sensor, time)['value'], 0) AS fault FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= now() - INTERVAL '2 minutes'

panels.title: West Fault

panels.description: Estimated savings from solar production today, calculated using fixed rates 3.5 THB/kWh

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hourly_kwh * 3.5), 0) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hourly_kwh * 3.5), 0) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

panels.title: Today's Savings

panels.description: Month-to-date estimated savings from solar production using fixed rates 3.5 THB/kWh

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hourly_kwh * 3.5), 0) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('month', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hourly_kwh * 3.5), 0) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('month', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

panels.title: Month Savings

panels.description: Year-to-date estimated savings from solar production using fixed rates 3.5 THB/kWh

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hourly_kwh * 3.5), 0) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "East Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('year', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(hourly_kwh * 3.5), 0) AS savings_thb FROM (SELECT DATE_BIN(INTERVAL '1 hour', time, '1970-01-01T00:00:00Z') AS bucket, AVG(COALESCE(pv1_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv2_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv3_power_sensor, 0) + COALESCE(pv4_power_sensor, 0)) / 1000.0 AS hourly_kwh FROM "West Microinverter" WHERE time >= date_trunc('year', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' GROUP BY 1) WHERE hourly_kwh > 0

panels.title: Year Savings

panels.description: Number of grid backfeed events today (Smart Meter power < 0)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "Count"
FROM "grid"
WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
  AND power < 0

panels.title: Today's Backfeed Count

panels.description: Maximum grid backfeed power today (absolute value)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ABS(MIN(power)) AS "Max Export"
FROM "grid"
WHERE time >= date_trunc('day', tz(now(), 'Asia/Bangkok')) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
  AND power < 0

panels.title: Max Backfeed Power

panels.description: Instances where grid power went negative (export/backfeed)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time AS "Time",
  ABS(power) AS "Export Power (W)",
  voltage AS "Voltage (V)",
  current AS "Current (A)"
FROM "grid"
WHERE time >= $__timeFrom AND time <= $__timeTo
  AND power < 0
ORDER BY time DESC
